contract.title: The Wax Eclipse Bond
contract.premise: A sealed bond for a chapel repair fund bears an eclipse mark dated three days too early.

evidence_assets.title: Chapel repair bond
evidence_assets.public_summary: The bond seal includes a darkened sun before the almanac says it appeared.

evidence_assets.title: Almanac leaf
evidence_assets.public_summary: A torn almanac page narrows the impossible date.

hidden_truth.summary: The bond was backdated with consecrated wax to bind the repair fund to an eclipse vow.

artifacts.title: Sealed Repair Bond
artifacts.public_summary: A chapel repair bond carries a sun-dark seal dated before the recorded sky event, entered under a notary stamp.
artifacts.full_text: Bond abstract: repair fund assigned under a blackened sun seal. Filing date precedes the almanac by three days. The notary's filing stamp sits beside the seal.

artifacts.title: Torn Almanac Leaf
artifacts.public_summary: The almanac leaf places the sky event after the bond was filed.
artifacts.full_text: Almanac leaf: total obscuration listed three days after the bond filing. Margin note: bells kept ringing through noon.

artifacts.title: Notary Counterbook
artifacts.public_summary: The notary counterbook shows a missing oath line and a second seal impression.
artifacts.full_text: Counterbook: oath line left blank, then filled in a different hand. Secondary impression was pressed through warm wax.

artifacts.title: Bell Ringer Invoice
artifacts.public_summary: An invoice pays bell ringers for a noon service no parish calendar lists.
artifacts.full_text: Invoice: four bell ringers paid for a private noon service. Disbursement references the same repair fund as the bond.

edges.public_summary: The bond filing points toward the notary's duplicate seal record.
The almanac bell note points toward an unlisted noon service.
The counterbook and bell invoice connect the seal date to chapel funds.

unlock_rules.award_reason: Pulled the notary counterbook behind the filed bond.
Followed the almanac bell note to a private service invoice.

allowed_reveal_strings: The seal date does not survive contact with the almanac.
The repair fund reaches a private noon service.

rubric_facts.reveal: The seal date does not survive contact with the almanac.
The repair fund reaches a private noon service.
